author: nitsan
text:
nice
referrencing should be more human friendly, auto-completable, not using IDs but slugs maybe, can do it w ids behind the scenes

author: claude
text: Agreed — [[^a3f]] was engineer-brain. Switching the surface syntax to human slugs ([[playful]], [[intro/technical]] when ambiguous) with stable ids only behind the scenes, and the demo will show the autocomplete moment: typing [[ opens a picker filtered as you type. Updating the DSL brief to match.

author: claude
text: Done — refresh: refs are now [[playful]] [[technical]] [[narrative]], and the ghost-typing shows the autocomplete moment (typing [[ pops a picker that filters live, Enter snaps the slug into a pill). Hovering a slug pill highlights the referenced node in both the outline and the graph. Ids still exist under the hood, never on screen.
